tasks.prompt: Find the representative public Kubernetes source categories for Deployment rollout behavior. Use the pinned public docs copy and summarize only public evidence categories/counts.
Answer from public Kubernetes docs: when should a workload use liveness, readiness, and startup probes? Include public citation paths only.

Create or update a disposable public synthesis at synthesis/public-vault/kubernetes-docs/deployment-service-rollout.md titled Deployment Service Rollout Notes. Use source_refs sources/kubernetes/website/content/en/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment.md and sources/kubernetes/website/content/en/docs/concepts/services-networking/service.md. Body facts should explain deployment rollout status and service exposure at a high level.
body_facts: Deployments manage rollout progress by creating and updating ReplicaSets, which lets readers track whether updated Pods are progressing toward availability.
Services expose Pods through a stable network endpoint and abstract away changing Pod IPs while a rollout replaces backing Pods.
Together, Deployment rollout status and Service exposure show whether updated Pods are becoming available behind a consistent service address.

tasks.prompt: Package public evidence and freshness for the Kubernetes Deployment docs. Use the public source path sources/kubernetes/website/content/en/docs/concepts/workloads/controllers/deployment.md as the document ref when useful.
Find decision-like public evidence about Ingress versus Gateway API in the Kubernetes docs. If there is no formal ADR-style decision record, say so and answer from public docs evidence.
Before creating any new note, check public Kubernetes docs for existing ConfigMap and Secret guidance and projection freshness. Report whether a new synthesis would duplicate existing public sources.
Compare the public Kubernetes boundaries between Service, EndpointSlice, and Ingress. Use public citations and do not write a synthesis.
Find the public Kubernetes authority docs for RBAC and service account administration, then summarize which docs a user should read first. Prefer the access-authn-authz source discovery surface.
